input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.9.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.9.3
            TITLE: tilt test completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.9.3: Tilt Test Completion
IN.9.3 Tilt Test Completion  
Tilt Tests must be passed before a vehicle may attempt any further inspections
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 114 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Tilt Tests must be passed before a vehicle may attempt any further inspections
